notes: No database schema or permission migration is included in this release.
Added FLIP-style movement animation while dragging sidebar resources in the employee permission configuration page.
Added clearer dragging and drop-target visual states.
Kept the existing native drag-and-drop persistence flow without adding new dependencies.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.47 and production VITE variables, sync frontend/dist, then rebuild approval-app with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.16.47.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.47 and the production VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against the deployed site.
